description: Business letter. In Judaeo-Arabic. Damaged & faded. Dating: Probably 11th century. The sender is writing from Damsīs. Mentions trade in indigo and business in the Rīf. Also contains the intriguing phrase, "I wish someone would come and knock on the door and [...]." Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Shubrā Damsīs. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
